allow: Bash(D="/Users/fizz/.npm/_npx/b3ca12a867cd0704/node_modules"; echo "=== offline from env in build/config ===" ; grep -rhnE "offline" $D/@netlify/build/lib/core/*.js $D/@netlify/config/lib/*.js 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "env|NETLIFY|process|=.*true|flag" | head -20; echo "=== env flags mentioning EXTENSION/INTEGRATION/OFFLINE ==="; grep -rhoE "NETLIFY_[A-Z_]*\(OFFLINE|EXTENSION|INTEGRATION|TEST\)[A-Z_]*" $D/@netlify 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -20; echo "=== how build gets offline option ==="; grep -rhnE "offline" $D/netlify-cli/dist/commands/build/*.js 2>/dev/null | head)
